jobs.title: PSS Analyst - THE NORTH FACE
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: The North Face EMEA is looking for an outstanding PSS Analyst to join our team based in Stabio, Switzerland. Focus of this role will be on Retail Partner and Concession channel, with the key objective to create and implement new ways of working to elevate our Merchandise Planning and Trading aligned with the DTC business. You will be responsible for merchandise trading including all inventory management and Retail KPIs management and cross-functional go-to-market alignment and performance tracking. Also, you will play a key role to further strengthen our Retail Partner business in ITALY and GAS region, working closely with our Retail and Concession manager throughout the selling campaign. How you will make a difference - Lead and evolve best-in-class digital Merchandising Planning process fully aligned with our DTC strategy, positioning and with the seasonal merchandising strategy; - Full ownership to manage the performance of the defined assortment, working closely with a cross-functional team dedicated to B&M (Buyers and Retail Partner managers) ; - Work alongside our TNG buying team and PSS managers to manage seasonal, monthly and weekly intake requirements; - Working on Inventory Management and coverage optimization at product/size level and across our DCs, with focus on trading performance and stock level optimization, delivering against The North Face B&M and financial objectives; - Full alignment with overall go-to-market calendar to ensure seamless execution and strong accelerated growth; - Working in partnership with Buying, PSS and Sales Ops team on the development of yearly and seasonal merchandise financial plans across Revenue, COGS, Discounts, Margins, ASP and Units - Set standards of trading and buying processes and deliver best practices to be shared across our cross-functional teams, proactively proposing continuous improvements in processes and tools in collaboration with DTC counterparts and VF Central Team to reach trading excellence and best-in-class inventory management execution; - Constantly striving for innovation and to optimise ways of working by contributing in setting up new processes, tools and report. What you need to succeed? - 3+ yrs. of relevant work experience with proven track record in Merchandising Planning, trading or equivalent Business Planning/Trading role - Language skills: fluent in English and Italian - Relevant Merchandise Planning and analysis experience within a fast-paced retail business - Deep understanding of the fast-paced B&M environment and merchandising success factors for Retails - Outstanding understanding of all the Retail KPIs and how they are influencing stores’ P&L - Excellent knowledge of Excel. Knowledge of Access, SAP and BI systems is a plus. - Excellent analytical skills - Outstanding business- and financial acumen - Consumer-first, data savvy and brand-driven mindset - Highly performance driven and result-oriented team player who is getting things done - High maturity in managing organisational complexity and effective communication - Strategic and operational decision-making A formal education and subsequent University Bachelor or Master’s degree in related fields are nice to have, but we are most interested in your total experience and professional achievements. What is in it for you? - Playing a key role to accelerate our B&M growth within one of our leading brands - Joining an ambitious Retail and Concession team embedded into The North Face and VF, one of the largest, globally leading multi-brand organisations with great long-term career opportunities - Purpose-led, international, fun and challenging working environment We're in the business of unleashing human potential, driven by the ideas, energy and commitment of our people. That's why we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical and financial well-being for all VF associates. When it comes to benefits, we're the total package. - A supportive feedback-based culture where respect and integrity guide us in what we do - An inclusive international environment where people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles and nationalities love working together - Be part of an iconic lifestyle brand in a multi brand, multi countries organization - On site gym offering health and well-being initiatives - 50% discount on all VF brands Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity As a purpose-led, performance driven company, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Join the North Face Family The North Face was built on a love for the outdoors and the desire to enable all types of exploration, for all people, from their backyards to the Himalayas. Over the last 50 years we've lived by our "true north," the belief that exploration has the power to change us, to challenge us and to help us see the world from new perspectives. To help ignite a global movement of outdoor exploration, love for the natural world and an unwavering commitment to protect it, we welcome and encourage new participants to the outdoors. We extend our reach through support of non-profit organizations, establishing programs that connect participants with close-to-home recreation opportunities, and creating a connection with young leaders, inspiring them to explore and conserve. As we enter our sixth decade, we pledge to: - Empower exploration and the thrill of the unknown for as many people as possible - Protect the places where we live, play, and operate - Evolve the way we make our products by improving our environmental performance and social responsibility in the supply chain Our Parent Company, VF Corporation VF is one of the world's largest apparel, footwear and accessories companies connecting people to the lifestyles, activities and experiences they cherish through our family of iconic outdoor, active and workwear brands. At the heart of our journey lies our company-wide purpose: We power movements of sustainable and active lifestyles for the betterment of people and our planet. This is our purpose. It's the reason we come to work every day. It's a commitment shared by our global associates across all brands. Our purpose unites us and leads us to pursue our goals, together. This is our calling. Learn more at vfc.com If you like what you have read and want to join our team then we would like to hear from you! Please submit your application in English, as that's our common language! R-20230303-0011

titleByLocale.en: PSS Analyst - THE NORTH FACE
titleByLocale.it: PSS Analista - THE NORTH FACE
titleByLocale.fr: PSS Analyste - THE NORTH FACE

descriptionByLocale.it: La North Face EMEA è alla ricerca di un eccellente Analista PSS per unirsi al nostro team basato a Stabio, Svizzera. L'obiettivo principale di questo ruolo sarà il canale Retail Partner e Concession, con l'obiettivo di creare e implementare nuove modalità di lavoro per elevare la nostra pianificazione del mercato e il trading allineati con la DTC business. Sarà responsabile del trading del mercato, compresa la gestione di tutti i magazzini e la gestione dei KPI Retail e la sincronizzazione e la tracciatura della performance cross-funzionale. Inoltre, sarà un ruolo chiave per rafforzare ulteriormente il nostro business Retail Partner in ITALIA e GAS regione, lavorando in stretta collaborazione con il nostro manager di Retail e Concession durante la campagna di vendita. Come farai la differenza - Guida e evolve il processo di pianificazione del mercato digitale di alto livello, completamente allineato con la nostra strategia DTC, posizionamento e con la strategia di mercato stagionale; - Gestione completa per gestire il rendimento dell'assortimento definito, lavorando in stretta collaborazione con un team cross-funzionale dedicato a B&M (Acquistatori e manager di Retail Partner); - Lavora insieme al nostro team di acquisti TNG e manager PSS per gestire le richieste di ingresso stagionale, mensili e settimanali; - Lavora sulla gestione degli inventari e l'ottimizzazione della copertura a livello prodotto/taglia e across i nostri DCs, con enfasi sulle prestazioni del trading e l'ottimizzazione dei livelli di stock, che consegna contro gli obiettivi B&M e finanziari di The North Face; - Alleanza completa con il calendario di lancio generale per garantire un'esecuzione liscia e un forte accrescimento accelerato; - Lavora in partenariato con l'acquisto, PSS e Sales Ops team sullo sviluppo dei piani finanziari del mercato annuale e stagionale per Revenue, COGS, Sconti, Margini, ASP e Unità - Stabilisci standard di trading e processi di acquisto e consegna le migliori pratiche da condividere tra i nostri team cross-funzionali, proponendo miglioramenti continui nei processi e nelle attrezzature in collaborazione con i controparti DTC e il team centrale di VF per raggiungere l'eccellenza del trading e l'esecuzione di gestione degli inventari di alto livello; - Cerca costantemente l'innovazione e l'ottimizzazione delle modalità di lavoro contribuendo alla configurazione di nuovi processi, attrezzature e report. Cosa ti serve per avere successo? - 3+ anni di esperienza lavorativa rilevante con un record provato in Pianificazione del mercato, trading o ruolo di Business Planning/Trading equivalente - Abilità linguistiche: fluente in inglese e italiano - Esperienza rilevante di pianificazione del mercato e analisi all'interno di un business di retail veloce - Profonda comprensione dell'ambiente B&M veloce e fattori di successo del mercato per i Retail - Comprensione eccellente di tutti i KPI Retail e come essi influenzano i bilanci delle attività delle attività - Eccellente conoscenza di Excel. La conoscenza di Access, SAP e BI è un plus - Eccellenti abilità analitiche - Comprensione eccellente dei mercati e dei finanziamenti - Mindset orientato al consumatore, dati e brand - Altamente motivato e orientato ai risultati, giocatore di squadra che ottiene risultati - Alta maturità nella gestione della complessità organizzativa e comunicazione efficace - Decisioni strategiche e operative - Una formazione formale e successiva laurea o master in campo correlato sono un plus, ma ciò che ci interessa di più è la tua esperienza totale e i tuoi risultati professionali. Cosa c'è in gioco per te? - Giocare un ruolo chiave per accelerare il nostro accrescimento B&M all'interno di uno dei nostri marchi di punta - Unirti a un team di Retail e Concession ambizioso integrato nella North Face e VF, una delle organizzazioni multinazionali più grandi e leader globali con grandi opportunità di carriera a lungo termine - Ambiente di lavoro guidato dallo scopo, internazionale, divertente e sfidante. Siamo nel business di liberare il potenziale umano, guidati dalle idee, dall'energia e dal impegno delle nostre persone. È per questo che offriamo benefici completi che incoraggiano la salute mentale, fisica e finanziaria per tutti gli associati di VF. Quando si tratta di benefici, siamo il pacchetto completo. - Una cultura di feedback supportiva dove il rispetto e l'integrità ci guidano in ciò che facciamo - Un ambiente internazionale inclusivo dove le persone di diverse background, stili di vita e nazionalità amano lavorare insieme - Partecipa a un marchio di lifestyle iconico in un'organizzazione multi-brand, multi-paese - Palestra in loco offrendo iniziative per la salute e il benessere - 50% di sconto su tutti i marchi di VF Libero di essere, Inclusione e Diversità Come società guidata dallo scopo e orientata ai risultati, ci impegniamo a creare una cultura di appartenenza basata sul rispetto, la connessione, l'apertura e l'autenticità. Siamo impegnati a costruire e mantenere un luogo di lavoro che celebra la diversità dei nostri associati, consentendo loro di portare se stessi autentici al lavoro ogni giorno. Unisciti alla Famiglia della North Face La North Face è stata costruita su un amore per la natura e il desiderio di abilitare tutti i tipi di esplorazione, per tutte le persone, dai loro giardini ai Himalaya. Negli ultimi 50 anni abbiamo vissuto secondo il nostro 'vero nord', la credenza che l'esplorazione abbia il potere di cambiare noi, di sfidare noi e di aiutarci a vedere il mondo da nuove prospettive. Per aiutare a scatenare un movimento globale di esplorazione all'aperto, amore per il mondo naturale e un impegno incondizionato a proteggerlo, accogliamo e incoraggiamo nuovi partecipanti all'aperto. Estendiamo la nostra portata attraverso il sostegno di organizzazioni non profit, stabilendo programmi che connettono i partecipanti con opportunità di ricreazione vicine a casa, e creando un collegamento con i giovani leader, ispirandoli a esplorare e conservare. Mentre entriamo nella nostra sesta decade, ci impegniamo a: - Dare potere all'esplorazione e al fascino dell'ignoto per il maggior numero di persone possibile - Proteggere i luoghi in cui viviamo, giociamo e operiamo - Evolvere la maniera in cui produciamo i nostri prodotti migliorando le nostre prestazioni ambientali e la responsabilità sociale nella nostra catena di fornitura. La nostra società madre, VF Corporation VF è una delle aziende di abbigliamento, calzature e accessori più grandi al mondo che connette le persone ai modi di vita, alle attività e alle esperienze che apprezzano attraverso la nostra famiglia di marchi iconici di outdoor, attivo e di lavoro. Al cuore del nostro viaggio c'è il nostro scopo aziendale: Potenziamo i movimenti di stili di vita sostenibili e attivi per il meglio delle persone e del nostro pianeta. Questo è il nostro scopo. È la ragione per cui veniamo al lavoro ogni giorno. È un impegno condiviso dai nostri associati globali di tutte le marche. Il nostro scopo ci unisce e ci guida a perseguire i nostri obiettivi, insieme. Questo è il nostro appello. Scopri di più su vfc.com Se ti piace ciò che hai letto e vuoi unirti al nostro team, vorremmo sentire da te! Sii gentile di inviare la tua domanda in inglese, poiché è la nostra lingua comune! R-20230303-0011
descriptionByLocale.en: The North Face EMEA is looking for an outstanding PSS Analyst to join our team based in Stabio, Switzerland. Focus of this role will be on Retail Partner and Concession channel, with the key objective to create and implement new ways of working to elevate our Merchandise Planning and Trading aligned with the DTC business. You will be responsible for merchandise trading including all inventory management and Retail KPIs management and cross-functional go-to-market alignment and performance tracking. Also, you will play a key role to further strengthen our Retail Partner business in ITALY and GAS region, working closely with our Retail and Concession manager throughout the selling campaign. How you will make a difference - Lead and evolve best-in-class digital Merchandising Planning process fully aligned with our DTC strategy, positioning and with the seasonal merchandising strategy; - Full ownership to manage the performance of the defined assortment, working closely with a cross-functional team dedicated to B&M (Buyers and Retail Partner managers) ; - Work alongside our TNG buying team and PSS managers to manage seasonal, monthly and weekly intake requirements; - Working on Inventory Management and coverage optimization at product/size level and across our DCs, with focus on trading performance and stock level optimization, delivering against The North Face B&M and financial objectives; - Full alignment with overall go-to-market calendar to ensure seamless execution and strong accelerated growth; - Working in partnership with Buying, PSS and Sales Ops team on the development of yearly and seasonal merchandise financial plans across Revenue, COGS, Discounts, Margins, ASP and Units - Set standards of trading and buying processes and deliver best practices to be shared across our cross-functional teams, proactively proposing continuous improvements in processes and tools in collaboration with DTC counterparts and VF Central Team to reach trading excellence and best-in-class inventory management execution; - Constantly striving for innovation and to optimise ways of working by contributing in setting up new processes, tools and report. What you need to succeed? - 3+ yrs. of relevant work experience with proven track record in Merchandising Planning, trading or equivalent Business Planning/Trading role - Language skills: fluent in English and Italian - Relevant Merchandise Planning and analysis experience within a fast-paced retail business - Deep understanding of the fast-paced B&M environment and merchandising success factors for Retails - Outstanding understanding of all the Retail KPIs and how they are influencing stores’ P&L - Excellent knowledge of Excel. Knowledge of Access, SAP and BI systems is a plus. - Excellent analytical skills - Outstanding business- and financial acumen - Consumer-first, data savvy and brand-driven mindset - Highly performance driven and result-oriented team player who is getting things done - High maturity in managing organisational complexity and effective communication - Strategic and operational decision-making A formal education and subsequent University Bachelor or Master’s degree in related fields are nice to have, but we are most interested in your total experience and professional achievements. What is in it for you? - Playing a key role to accelerate our B&M growth within one of our leading brands - Joining an ambitious Retail and Concession team embedded into The North Face and VF, one of the largest, globally leading multi-brand organisations with great long-term career opportunities - Purpose-led, international, fun and challenging working environment We're in the business of unleashing human potential, driven by the ideas, energy and commitment of our people. That's why we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical and financial well-being for all VF associates. When it comes to benefits, we're the total package. - A supportive feedback-based culture where respect and integrity guide us in what we do - An inclusive international environment where people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles and nationalities love working together - Be part of an iconic lifestyle brand in a multi brand, multi countries organization - On site gym offering health and well-being initiatives - 50% discount on all VF brands Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity As a purpose-led, performance driven company, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Join the North Face Family The North Face was built on a love for the outdoors and the desire to enable all types of exploration, for all people, from their backyards to the Himalayas. Over the last 50 years we've lived by our "true north," the belief that exploration has the power to change us, to challenge us and to help us see the world from new perspectives. To help ignite a global movement of outdoor exploration, love for the natural world and an unwavering commitment to protect it, we welcome and encourage new participants to the outdoors. We extend our reach through support of non-profit organizations, establishing programs that connect participants with close-to-home recreation opportunities, and creating a connection with young leaders, inspiring them to explore and conserve. As we enter our sixth decade, we pledge to: - Empower exploration and the thrill of the unknown for as many people as possible - Protect the places where we live, play, and operate - Evolve the way we make our products by improving our environmental performance and social responsibility in the supply chain Our Parent Company, VF Corporation VF is one of the world's largest apparel, footwear and accessories companies connecting people to the lifestyles, activities and experiences they cherish through our family of iconic outdoor, active and workwear brands. At the heart of our journey lies our company-wide purpose: We power movements of sustainable and active lifestyles for the betterment of people and our planet. This is our purpose. It's the reason we come to work every day. It's a commitment shared by our global associates across all brands. Our purpose unites us and leads us to pursue our goals, together. This is our calling. Learn more at vfc.com If you like what you have read and want to join our team then we would like to hear from you! Please submit your application in English, as that's our common language! R-20230303-0011
descriptionByLocale.de: Die North Face EMEA sucht einen hervorragenden PSS Analyst, um Teil unseres Teams in Stabio, Schweiz, zu werden. Der Schwerpunkt dieses Rollen wird auf den Retail-Partner- und Concession-Kanal liegen, mit dem Ziel, neue Wege der Arbeit zu schaffen und unsere Merchandise-Planung und -Handel mit der DTC-Business-Strategie zu verbinden. Sie werden für den Handel mit Waren verantwortlich sein, einschließlich der Inventarverwaltung und der Verwaltung von Retail-KPIs sowie der cross-funktionalen Abstimmung und -Überwachung der Leistung. Darüber hinaus wird sie einen wichtigen Beitrag zur Stärkung unseres Retail-Partner-Geschäfts in ITALIEN und GAS-Region leisten, indem sie eng mit unserem Retail- und Concession-Manager während der Verkaufskampagne zusammenarbeitet. Wie wird sie einen Unterschied machen? - Führen und entwickeln Sie einen führenden digitalen Merchandise-Planungsprozess, der vollständig mit unserer DTC-Strategie, Positionierung und saisonaler Merchandise-Strategie übereinstimmt; - Vollständige Verantwortung für die Verwaltung der Leistung des definierten Sortiments, wobei sie eng mit einem cross-funktionalen Team zusammenarbeitet, das sich auf B&M (Käufer und Retail-Partner-Manager) konzentriert; - Arbeiten Sie mit unserem TNG-Käufer-Team und PSS-Manager zusammen, um die saisonalen, monatlichen und wöchentlichen Eingabeanforderungen zu verwalten; - Arbeiten Sie an der Inventarverwaltung und der Optimierung der Deckung auf Produkt-/Größen-Ebene und über unsere DCs hinweg, mit Schwerpunkt auf Handelsleistung und Lagerstoffsicherung, um gegen die North Face-B&M- und Finanzziele zu liefern; - Vollständige Abstimmung mit dem allgemeinen Markteintrittskalender, um eine glatte Ausführung und einen starken beschleunigten Wachstum zu gewährleisten; - Arbeiten Sie in Partnerschaft mit dem Käufer-, PSS- und Vertriebs-Operations-Team an der Entwicklung von jährlichen und saisonalen Handelsfinanzplänen für Umsatz, COGS, Rabatte, Margen, ASP und Einheiten; - Stellen Sie Standards für Handel und Kaufprozesse auf und liefern Sie beste Praktiken, um sie zwischen unseren cross-funktionalen Teams zu teilen, und schlagen Sie kontinuierliche Verbesserungen in Prozessen und Werkzeugen vor, um in Zusammenarbeit mit DTC-Gegnern und dem VF-Zentralteam Handelsexzellenz und beste Inventarverwaltungsexekution zu erreichen; - Suchen Sie ständig nach Innovation und Optimierung von Arbeitsmethoden, indem Sie bei der Einrichtung neuer Prozesse, Werkzeuge und Berichte mitwirken. Was braucht sie, um erfolgreich zu sein? - 3+ Jahre relevanter Berufserfahrung mit einem nachgewiesenen Erfolg in Merchandise-Planung, Handel oder einem äquivalenten Business-Planungs-/Handels-Role - Sprachkenntnisse: fließend in Englisch und Italienisch - Relevante Erfahrung in Merchandise-Planung und -Analyse innerhalb eines schnellen Verkaufsunternehmens - Tiefes Verständnis des schnellen B&M-Umfelds und der Erfolgsfaktoren des Retail-Marktes - Ausgezeichnete Kenntnisse von Excel - Kenntnisse von Access, SAP und BI sind ein Plus - Ausgezeichnete analytische Fähigkeiten - Ausgezeichnete Geschäftskompetenz und Finanzkenntnisse - Verbraucherorientierte, datenorientierte und markenorientierte Denkweise - Hochmotiviert und resultatorientiert, Teamplayer, der Ergebnisse erzielt - Hohe Reife bei der Verwaltung organisatorischer Komplexität und effektiver Kommunikation - Strategische und operative Entscheidungsfindung - Eine formelle Ausbildung und eine nachfolgende Universitätsabschluss oder Master-Abschluss in einem verwandten Fach sind wünschenswert, aber wir sind am meisten an Ihrer Gesamterfahrung und Ihren beruflichen Erfolgen interessiert. Was ist darin für sie drin? - Ein wichtiger Beitrag zum Beschleunigen unseres B&M-Wachstums innerhalb eines unserer führenden Marken - Teilnahme an einem ambitionierten Retail- und Concession-Team, das in die North Face und VF integriert ist, einer der größten und führenden multinationalen Organisationen mit großem langfristigen Karrierepotenzial - Zweckgebundenes, internationales, unterhaltsames und herausforderndes Arbeitsumfeld Wir sind im Geschäft, um das menschliche Potenzial zu entfesseln, getrieben von den Ideen, der Energie und dem Engagement unserer Menschen. Deshalb bieten wir umfassende Vorteile, die die geistige, körperliche und finanzielle Gesundheit aller VF-Mitarbeiter fördern. Wenn es um Vorteile geht, sind wir das Gesamtpaket. - Eine unterstützende Feedback-Kultur, in der Respekt und Integrität uns bei allem, was wir tun, leiten - Ein inklusives internationales Umfeld, in dem Menschen mit verschiedenen Hintergründen, Lebensstilen und Nationalitäten gerne zusammenarbeiten - Teilnahme an einem ikonischen Lifestyle-Marken in einer multi-brand-, multi-country-Organisation - Fitnessstudio auf dem Gelände, das Gesundheits- und Wellnessinitiativen anbietet - 50% Ermäßigung auf alle VF-Marken Frei zu sein, Inklusion und Vielfalt Als Unternehmen, das von einem Zweck geleitet wird und auf Ergebnisse setzt, streben wir danach, eine Kultur der Zugehörigkeit aufzubauen, die auf Respekt, Verbindung, Offenheit und Authentizität basiert. Wir sind verpflichtet, eine Arbeitsumgebung zu schaffen, die die Vielfalt unserer Mitarbeiter feiert, ihnen ermöglicht, ihre authentischen Selbst zu der Arbeit zu bringen. Teilnehmen Sie der North Face-Familie Die North Face wurde auf einem Liebe zur Natur und dem Wunsch aufgebaut, alle Arten von Explorationen für alle Menschen zu ermöglichen, von ihren Gärten bis zu den Himalaya. In den letzten 50 Jahren haben wir uns nach unserem 'wahren Norden' gerichtet, der Überzeugung, dass Exploration die Menschen ändern, sie herausfordern und ihnen helfen kann, die Welt aus neuen Perspektiven zu sehen. Um ein globales Bewegung der Außenaktivitäten, Liebe zur Natur und einen unerschütterlichen Einsatz zur Schutz zu fördern, begrüßen wir und ermutigen wir neue Teilnehmer an der Außenaktivität. Wir erweitern unsere Reichweite durch die Unterstützung von gemeinnützigen Organisationen, die Einrichtung von Programmen, die Teilnehmer mit nahezu zu Hause liegenden Freizeitaktivitäten verbinden, und die Schaffung eines Verbindungsnetzwerks mit jungen Führungskräften, die sie ermutigen, zu erkunden und zu bewahren. Während wir in unsere sechste Dekade eintreten, geloben wir: - Macht für Exploration und das Faszinierende des Unbekannten für so viele Menschen wie möglich zu schaffen - Die Orte, an denen wir leben, spielen und operieren, zu schützen - Die Art und Weise, wie wir unsere Produkte herstellen, zu verbessern, indem wir unsere Umweltleistung und unsere soziale Verantwortung in der Lieferkette verbessern. Unsere Muttergesellschaft, VF Corporation VF ist eine der weltweit größten Bekleidungs-, Schuh- und Accessoires-Unternehmen, die Menschen mit Lebensstilen, Aktivitäten und Erfahrungen verbindet, die sie schätzen, durch unsere Familie von ikonischen Outdoor-, Aktiv- und Arbeitskleidungsmarken. Im Herzen unseres Weges liegt unser Unternehmenszweck: Wir fördern Bewegungen nachhaltiger und aktiver Lebensstile für das Wohlergehen der Menschen und unseres Planeten. Dies ist unser Zweck. Es ist der Grund, warum wir jeden Tag zum Arbeiten kommen. Es ist ein Engagement, das von unseren globalen Mitarbeitern aller Marken geteilt wird. Unsere Mission vereint uns und leitet uns bei der Verfolgung unserer Ziele, zusammen. Dies ist unser Aufruf. Mehr erfahren Sie auf vfc.com Wenn Sie, was Sie gelesen haben, und möchten, dass Sie Teil unseres Teams werden, würden wir gerne von Ihnen hören! Bitte senden Sie Ihre Bewerbung auf Englisch, da es unsere gemeinsame Sprache ist! R-20230303-0011
descriptionByLocale.fr: La North Face EMEA recherche un analyste PSS exceptionnel pour rejoindre notre équipe basée à Stabio, en Suisse. Le focus de ce rôle sera sur le canal de vente au détail et de concession, avec l'objectif de créer et d'implémenter de nouvelles méthodes de travail pour élever notre planification de la marchandise et le trading alignés avec la stratégie DTC. Vous serez responsable de la gestion du trading de la marchandise, y compris la gestion des stocks et la gestion des indicateurs de performance de vente au détail, ainsi que l'alignement et la surveillance de la performance cross-fonctionnelle. De plus, vous jouerez un rôle clé pour renforcer notre business de vente au détail et de concession en ITALIE et dans la région GAS, en travaillant en étroite collaboration avec notre manager de vente au détail et de concession pendant la campagne de vente. Comment ferez-vous la différence? - Diriger et évoluer un processus de planification de la marchandise numérique de haut niveau, complètement aligné avec notre stratégie DTC, notre positionnement et notre stratégie de marchandise saisonnière; - Pleine responsabilité pour gérer les performances de l'assortiment défini, en travaillant en étroite collaboration avec un équipe cross-fonctionnelle dédiée à B&M (acheteurs et managers de vente au détail); - Travailler avec notre équipe d'achat TNG et managers PSS pour gérer les besoins d'entrée saisonniers, mensuels et hebdomadaires; - Travailler sur la gestion des stocks et l'optimisation de la couverture au niveau produit/taille et au niveau des DCs, avec un accent sur les performances du trading et la sécurité des stocks, pour livrer contre les objectifs B&M et financiers de The North Face; - Pleine alignment avec le calendrier de lancement général pour garantir une exécution lisse et un accélération de croissance forte; - Travailler en partenariat avec l'équipe d'achat, PSS et Sales Ops pour développer des plans financiers de trading annuels et saisonniers pour les revenus, les COGS, les rabais, les marges, les ASP et les unités; - Établir des normes de trading et de processus d'achat et livrer des meilleures pratiques à partager entre les équipes cross-fonctionnelles, et proposer des améliorations continues dans les processus et les outils en collaboration avec les contreparties DTC et l'équipe centrale de VF pour atteindre l'excellence du trading et l'exécution de la gestion des stocks de haut niveau; - Chercher constamment l'innovation et l'optimisation des méthodes de travail en contribuant à la mise en place de nouveaux processus, outils et rapports. Qu'est-ce que vous devez réussir? - 3+ ans d'expérience professionnelle pertinente avec un bilan prouvé en planification de la marchandise, trading ou un rôle de planification de business/trading équivalent; - Langues : fluide en anglais et italien; - Expérience pertinente de planification de la marchandise et d'analyse dans un business de vente au détail rapide; - Compréhension approfondie de l'environnement B&M rapide et des facteurs de succès du marché de vente au détail; - Connaissances excellentes d'Excel; - Connaissances de Access, SAP et BI sont un plus; - Compétences analytiques excellentes; - Compétences commerciales et financières exceptionnelles; - Mindset orienté vers le consommateur, les données et la marque; - Très motivé et orienté vers les résultats, joueur de équipe qui obtient des résultats; - Haute maturité dans la gestion de la complexité organisationnelle et de la communication efficace; - Prise de décision stratégique et opérationnelle; - Une formation formelle et une suite universitaire ou master en domaine connexe sont un plus, mais nous sommes le plus intéressé par votre expérience totale et vos réalisations professionnelles. Qu'est-ce qu'il y a en jeu pour vous? - Jouer un rôle clé pour accélérer notre croissance B&M au sein d'une de nos marques de tête; - Rejoindre une équipe de vente au détail et de concession ambitieuse intégrée dans la North Face et VF, l'une des plus grandes et des plus grandes organisations multinationales avec de grandes opportunités de carrière à long terme; - Environnement de travail guidé par un but, international, amusant et stimulant. Nous sommes dans le business de libérer le potentiel humain, motivés par les idées, l'énergie et l'engagement de nos gens. C'est pourquoi nous offrons des avantages complets qui encouragent la santé mentale, physique et financière pour tous les associés de VF. Lorsqu'il s'agit d'avantages, nous sommes le paquet complet. - Une culture de feedback supportif où le respect et l'intégrité nous guident dans tout ce que nous faisons; - Un environnement international inclusif où les gens de diverses origines, styles de vie et nationalités aiment travailler ensemble; - Participez à une marque de lifestyle iconique dans une organisation multi-brand, multi-pays; - Gym sur place offrant des initiatives de santé et de bien-être; - 50% de réduction sur tous les marques de VF Libre d'être, Inclusion et Diversité Comme entreprise guidée par un but et orientée vers les résultats, nous nous engageons à créer une culture de appartenance basée sur le respect, la connexion, l'ouverture et l'autenticité. Nous sommes engagés à construire et à maintenir un lieu de travail qui célèbre la diversité de nos associés, leur permettant de porter leurs vraies soi au travail chaque jour. Rejoignez la famille de la North Face La North Face a été construite sur un amour de la nature et le désir de permettre à tous les types d'exploration pour toutes les personnes, de leurs jardins aux Himalayas. Au cours des 50 dernières années, nous avons vécu selon notre 'vrai nord', la croyance que l'exploration a le pouvoir de changer nous, de nous défier et de nous aider à voir le monde de nouvelles perspectives. Pour aider à déclencher un mouvement global d'exploration à l'air libre, d'amour pour la nature et un engagement inconditionnel à la protéger, nous accueillons et encourageons de nouveaux participants à l'air libre. Nous étendons notre portée par le soutien d'organisations à but non lucratif, l'établissement de programmes qui connectent les participants avec des opportunités de loisirs à proximité, et la création d'un réseau de connexion avec des jeunes leaders, les encourageant à explorer et à conserver. Alors que nous entrons dans notre sixième décennie, nous nous engageons à: - Donner du pouvoir à l'exploration et à l'attrait du inconnu pour le plus grand nombre de personnes possible; - Protéger les endroits où nous vivons, jouons et opérons; - Évoluer la manière dont nous produisons nos produits en améliorant nos performances environnementales et notre responsabilité sociale dans la chaîne d'approvisionnement. Notre société mère, VF Corporation VF est l'une des plus grandes entreprises de vêtements, chaussures et accessoires du monde, qui relie les gens à des styles de vie, des activités et des expériences qu'ils apprécient, par notre famille de marques iconiques de vêtements de plein air, d'activité et de travail. Au cœur de notre parcours se trouve notre objectif d'entreprise: Nous encourageons les mouvements de styles de vie durables et actifs pour le bien-être des gens et de notre planète. C'est notre objectif. C'est la raison pour laquelle nous venons au travail chaque jour. C'est un engagement que nous partageons avec nos employés mondiaux de toutes les marques. Notre objectif nous unit et nous guide à poursuivre nos objectifs, ensemble. C'est notre appel. En savoir plus sur vfc.com Si vous aimez ce que vous avez lu et que vous souhaitez rejoindre notre équipe, nous aimerions vous entendre! Veuillez envoyer votre candidature en anglais, car c'est notre langue commune! R-20230303-0011

jobs.title: Associate, Merchandising Operations (Timberland)
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: Timberland EMEA is looking for an exceptional Associate Merchandiser on a 6‑month fixed‑term contract , to join our team based in Stabio, Switzerland. ## ## Let’s Talk about the Role A day in the life of the Associate Merchandiser at Timberland looks a little like this. You will play a key role in supporting the merchandising team across seasonal milestones, ensuring accuracy of product information, coordination of assortments, and alignment with brand strategy. You will manage systems, samples, seasonal reporting, and performance analysis to help build consumer‑right assortments. You will also contribute to cross‑functional collaboration, supporting product development, pricing updates, and assortments across regions. Part of the role includes leading operational processes linked to the Eastpak project , driving coordination, planning, and consistency across global milestones. ## ## Let’s break down that day‑in‑the‑life a bit more - Own accurate management of product attributes. - Manage HTT assortment for the assigned collection & GBA (Bags, Women Outlet + support on Mainline Women), ensuring alignment with FTW, Accessories & Marketing. - Define ideal merchandising mix and seasonal priorities in alignment with the merchandising lead. - Support the merchandising team through data entry, sample organization, and seasonal reporting. - Track and analyze product performance to identify bestsellers, slow movers, and consumer trends. - Assist in building seasonal line plans, ensuring accurate product details and updates. - Partner with cross‑functional teams to support product development, pricing updates, and assortment alignment. - Manage system updates, including pricing, SKU management, and product information. - Support in‑season business tracking, enabling timely actions based on marketplace needs. - Manage ad‑hoc projects to grow autonomy in project management. - Present the collection to regional merchandising leads during key GTM milestones. ## ## EASTPAK PROJECT - Coordinate processes and alignment across all key milestones with the Eastpak team. - Support the creation of the line, ensuring alignment with Timberland’s and Eastpak’s brand strategy. - Lead calendar coordination and sample purchasing. - Work closely with AMER, EMEA, APAC, the Eastpak team, and Global TBL partners to deliver market‑relevant assortments. - Evaluate global line, trends, and competition to identify white‑space opportunities, including revenue and margin. - Support pricing and lifecycle management. - Conduct in‑season analysis with regional merchants and planners, identifying opportunities (including OMU/SMU). - Lead PLM implementation for Bags and ensure ongoing Enovia maintenance. ## ## How You Will Make a Difference You will achieve this by: - Maintaining accuracy and clarity across all merchandising systems and product information. - Working closely with merchandising leadership to support strategic and operational priorities. - Collaborating effectively with cross‑functional partners to enable smooth seasonal execution. - Bringing strong analytical skills to identify opportunities and improve line performance. - Demonstrating high attention to detail and ownership across processes and deliverables. - Supporting the alignment of seasonal assortments through clear communication and structured documentation. - Staying connected to market needs, consumer insights, and internal milestones to anticipate trends and react quickly. ## ## Skills for Success While formal education in merchandising, business, marketing or a related field is a plus, what matters most is a few years of experience in merchandising, product management, or a related area. The foundational skills required are: - Strong analytical skills and understanding of product performance. - Solid knowledge of merchandising processes and product lifecycle. - Excellent organizational skills and ability to manage multiple priorities. - Strong attention to detail and accuracy. - Ability to work collaboratively across global and regional teams. - Strong communication skills, written and verbal. - Proficiency with merchandising systems (PLM, Enovia preferred) and Excel. - Proactive, solution‑oriented mindset. - Flexibility to support seasonal workload peaks. ## ## What’s in it For You - A supportive, feedback‑based culture guided by respect and integrity. - An inclusive, international environment where diverse backgrounds and experiences are valued. - The opportunity to be part of an iconic lifestyle brand within a global, multi‑brand organization. - On‑site gym with health and well‑being initiatives. - A discount card offering 50% off all VF brands. - Break‑out areas with complimentary hot drinks. ## ## Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity As a purpose‑led, performance‑driven company, we foster a culture of belonging based on respect, openness, connection, and authenticity. We celebrate diversity and support equal opportunities for all associates and applicants. If this sounds like you and you’re ready to join our team, we’d love to hear from you! #readytoapply R-20260309-0029

titleByLocale.en: Associate, Merchandising Operations (Timberland)
titleByLocale.it: Associato, Operazioni di merchandising (Timberland)
titleByLocale.fr: Associé, opérations de marchandisage (Timberland)

descriptionByLocale.it: Timberland EMEA è alla ricerca di un Associate Merchandiser eccezionale con un contratto a tempo determinato di 6 mesi, da inserire nel nostro team con sede a Stabio, Svizzera. ## ## Parliamo del ruolo Una giornata nella vita dell'Associate Merchandiser presso Timberland assomiglia un po' a questa. Giocherai un ruolo chiave nel supportare il team di merchandising durante i traguardi stagionali, garantendo l'accuratezza delle informazioni sui prodotti, il coordinamento degli assortimenti e l'allineamento con la strategia del marchio. Gestirai sistemi, campioni, report stagionali e analisi delle prestazioni per aiutare a creare assortimenti adatti al consumatore. Contribuirai inoltre alla collaborazione interfunzionale, supportando lo sviluppo dei prodotti, gli aggiornamenti dei prezzi e gli assortimenti tra le regioni. Parte del ruolo include la guida dei processi operativi collegati al progetto Eastpak, guidando il coordinamento, la pianificazione e la coerenza tra le tappe fondamentali globali. ## ## Analizziamo un po' meglio quella giornata: Gestisci in modo accurato gli attributi del prodotto. - Gestire l'assortimento HTT per la collezione assegnata e supporto GBA (Bags, Women Outlet + su Mainline Women), garantendo l'allineamento con FTW, Accessories e Marketing. - Definire il mix di merchandising ideale e le priorità stagionali in linea con il lead di merchandising. - Supportare il team di merchandising attraverso l'immissione di dati, l'organizzazione del campione e il reporting stagionale. - Tieni traccia e analizza le prestazioni dei prodotti per identificare i bestseller, i movimenti lenti e le tendenze dei consumatori. - Assistere nella creazione di piani di linea stagionali, e garantendo dettagli e aggiornamenti accurati del prodotto. - Collaborare con team interfunzionali per supportare lo sviluppo del prodotto, gli aggiornamenti dei prezzi e l'allineamento dell'assortimento. - Gestisci gli aggiornamenti di sistema, inclusi prezzi, gestione SKU e informazioni sul prodotto. - Supportare il monitoraggio delle attività stagionali, consentendo azioni tempestive in base alle esigenze del mercato. - Gestire progetti ad-hoc per aumentare l'autonomia nella gestione dei progetti. - Presentare la collezione ai responsabili del merchandising regionale durante le tappe fondamentali del GTM. ## ## PROGETTO EASTPAK - Coordinare i processi e l'allineamento su tutte le tappe fondamentali con il team Eastpak. - Supportare la creazione della linea, garantendo l'allineamento con la strategia del marchio Timberland e Eastpak. - Coordinamento del calendario e acquisto dei campioni. - Lavorare a stretto contatto con AMER, EMEA, APAC, il team Eastpak e i partner globali di TBL per fornire assortimenti rilevanti per il mercato. - Valutare la linea globale, le tendenze e la concorrenza per identificare le opportunità di spazi vuoti, inclusi ricavi e margini. - Supportare la gestione dei prezzi e del ciclo di vita. - Condurre analisi stagionali con commercianti e pianificatori regionali, identificando opportunità (incluse OMU/SMU). - Guidare l'implementazione del PLM per le borse e garantire la manutenzione continua di Enovia. ## ## Come farai la differenza Otterrai questo risultato: - Mantenendo accuratezza e chiarezza in tutti i sistemi di merchandising e nelle informazioni sui prodotti. - Lavorare a stretto contatto con la leadership del merchandising per supportare le priorità strategiche e operative. - Collaborare in modo efficace con l'ingegno h Partner interfunzionali per consentire un'esecuzione regolare della stagione. - Apportare forti capacità analitiche per identificare opportunità e migliorare le prestazioni della linea. - Dimostrare elevata attenzione ai dettagli e proprietà attraverso processi e risultati finali. - Supportare l'allineamento degli assortimenti stagionali attraverso una comunicazione chiara e una documentazione strutturata. - Rimanere in contatto con le esigenze del mercato, le informazioni sui consumatori e le tappe fondamentali interne per anticipare le tendenze e reagire rapidamente. ## ## Competenze per il successo Sebbene l'istruzione formale nel merchandising, negli affari, nel marketing o in un campo correlato sia un vantaggio, ciò che conta di più sono alcuni anni di esperienza nel merchandising, nella gestione del prodotto o in un'area correlata. Le competenze fondamentali richieste sono: - Forti capacità analitiche e comprensione delle prestazioni del prodotto. - Solida conoscenza dei processi di merchandising e del ciclo di vita del prodotto. - Ottime capacità organizzative e capacità di gestire molteplici priorità. - Forte attenzione ai dettagli e alla precisione. - Capacità di lavorare in modo collaborativo tra team globali e regionali. - Forti capacità di comunicazione, scritta e verbale. - Competenza con i sistemi di merchandising (PLM, preferibile Enovia) ed Excel. - Mentalità proattiva e orientata alla soluzione. - Flessibilità per supportare i picchi di carico di lavoro stagionali. ## ## Cosa ci guadagni - Una cultura solidale e basata sul feedback, guidata dal rispetto e dall'integrità. - Un ambiente inclusivo e internazionale in cui vengono valorizzati background ed esperienze diverse. - L'opportunità di farne parte di un marchio iconico di lifestyle all’interno di un’organizzazione globale multimarca. - Palestra interna con iniziative di salute e benessere. - Una carta sconto che offre uno sconto del 50% su tutti i marchi VF. - Aree relax con bevande calde gratuite. ## ## Libertà di essere, inclusione e diversità In qualità di azienda orientata agli obiettivi e alle prestazioni, promuoviamo una cultura di appartenenza basata sul rispetto, l'apertura, la connessione e l'autenticità. Celebriamo la diversità e sosteniamo le pari opportunità per tutti gli associati e i candidati. Se suona come te e sei pronto per unirti al nostro team, ci piacerebbe sentire la tua opinione! #prontiperapplicareR-20260309-0029
descriptionByLocale.en: Timberland EMEA is looking for an exceptional Associate Merchandiser on a 6‑month fixed‑term contract , to join our team based in Stabio, Switzerland. ## ## Let’s Talk about the Role A day in the life of the Associate Merchandiser at Timberland looks a little like this. You will play a key role in supporting the merchandising team across seasonal milestones, ensuring accuracy of product information, coordination of assortments, and alignment with brand strategy. You will manage systems, samples, seasonal reporting, and performance analysis to help build consumer‑right assortments. You will also contribute to cross‑functional collaboration, supporting product development, pricing updates, and assortments across regions. Part of the role includes leading operational processes linked to the Eastpak project , driving coordination, planning, and consistency across global milestones. ## ## Let’s break down that day‑in‑the‑life a bit more - Own accurate management of product attributes. - Manage HTT assortment for the assigned collection & GBA (Bags, Women Outlet + support on Mainline Women), ensuring alignment with FTW, Accessories & Marketing. - Define ideal merchandising mix and seasonal priorities in alignment with the merchandising lead. - Support the merchandising team through data entry, sample organization, and seasonal reporting. - Track and analyze product performance to identify bestsellers, slow movers, and consumer trends. - Assist in building seasonal line plans, ensuring accurate product details and updates. - Partner with cross‑functional teams to support product development, pricing updates, and assortment alignment. - Manage system updates, including pricing, SKU management, and product information. - Support in‑season business tracking, enabling timely actions based on marketplace needs. - Manage ad‑hoc projects to grow autonomy in project management. - Present the collection to regional merchandising leads during key GTM milestones. ## ## EASTPAK PROJECT - Coordinate processes and alignment across all key milestones with the Eastpak team. - Support the creation of the line, ensuring alignment with Timberland’s and Eastpak’s brand strategy. - Lead calendar coordination and sample purchasing. - Work closely with AMER, EMEA, APAC, the Eastpak team, and Global TBL partners to deliver market‑relevant assortments. - Evaluate global line, trends, and competition to identify white‑space opportunities, including revenue and margin. - Support pricing and lifecycle management. - Conduct in‑season analysis with regional merchants and planners, identifying opportunities (including OMU/SMU). - Lead PLM implementation for Bags and ensure ongoing Enovia maintenance. ## ## How You Will Make a Difference You will achieve this by: - Maintaining accuracy and clarity across all merchandising systems and product information. - Working closely with merchandising leadership to support strategic and operational priorities. - Collaborating effectively with cross‑functional partners to enable smooth seasonal execution. - Bringing strong analytical skills to identify opportunities and improve line performance. - Demonstrating high attention to detail and ownership across processes and deliverables. - Supporting the alignment of seasonal assortments through clear communication and structured documentation. - Staying connected to market needs, consumer insights, and internal milestones to anticipate trends and react quickly. ## ## Skills for Success While formal education in merchandising, business, marketing or a related field is a plus, what matters most is a few years of experience in merchandising, product management, or a related area. The foundational skills required are: - Strong analytical skills and understanding of product performance. - Solid knowledge of merchandising processes and product lifecycle. - Excellent organizational skills and ability to manage multiple priorities. - Strong attention to detail and accuracy. - Ability to work collaboratively across global and regional teams. - Strong communication skills, written and verbal. - Proficiency with merchandising systems (PLM, Enovia preferred) and Excel. - Proactive, solution‑oriented mindset. - Flexibility to support seasonal workload peaks. ## ## What’s in it For You - A supportive, feedback‑based culture guided by respect and integrity. - An inclusive, international environment where diverse backgrounds and experiences are valued. - The opportunity to be part of an iconic lifestyle brand within a global, multi‑brand organization. - On‑site gym with health and well‑being initiatives. - A discount card offering 50% off all VF brands. - Break‑out areas with complimentary hot drinks. ## ## Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity As a purpose‑led, performance‑driven company, we foster a culture of belonging based on respect, openness, connection, and authenticity. We celebrate diversity and support equal opportunities for all associates and applicants. If this sounds like you and you’re ready to join our team, we’d love to hear from you! #readytoapply R-20260309-0029
descriptionByLocale.de: Timberland EMEA sucht einen außergewöhnlichen Associate Merchandiser mit einem 6-monatigen befristeten Vertrag zur Verstärkung unseres Teams mit Sitz in Stabio, Schweiz. ## ## Reden wir über die Rolle Ein Tag im Leben des Associate Merchandisers bei Timberland sieht in etwa so aus. Sie spielen eine Schlüsselrolle bei der Unterstützung des Merchandising-Teams bei saisonalen Meilensteinen, indem Sie die Genauigkeit der Produktinformationen, die Koordination der Sortimente und die Ausrichtung auf die Markenstrategie sicherstellen. Sie verwalten Systeme, Muster, saisonale Berichte und Leistungsanalysen, um beim Aufbau verbrauchergerechter Sortimente zu helfen. Sie tragen außerdem zur funktionsübergreifenden Zusammenarbeit bei und unterstützen die Produktentwicklung, Preisaktualisierungen und Sortimente in verschiedenen Regionen. Ein Teil der Rolle umfasst die Leitung operativer Prozesse im Zusammenhang mit dem Eastpak-Projekt sowie die Förderung der Koordination, Planung und Konsistenz über globale Meilensteine ​​hinweg. ## ## Lassen Sie uns diesen Tag im Leben etwas genauer aufschlüsseln – Eigene, genaue Verwaltung von Produktattributen. - Verwalten Sie das HTT-Sortiment für die zugewiesene Kollektion und GBA (Taschen, Damen-Outlet – Unterstützung für Mainline Women) und stellen Sie die Abstimmung mit FTW, Accessoires und Marketing sicher. - Definieren Sie den idealen Merchandising-Mix und die saisonalen Prioritäten in Abstimmung mit dem Merchandising-Leiter. - Unterstützen Sie das Merchandising-Team durch Dateneingabe, Musterorganisation und saisonale Berichterstattung. - Verfolgen und analysieren Sie die Produktleistung, um Bestseller, Langsamläufer und Verbrauchertrends zu identifizieren. - Unterstützung bei der Erstellung saisonaler Linienpläne, z Gewährleistung genauer Produktdetails und Aktualisierungen. - Arbeiten Sie mit funktionsübergreifenden Teams zusammen, um die Produktentwicklung, Preisaktualisierungen und Sortimentsausrichtung zu unterstützen. - Verwalten Sie Systemaktualisierungen, einschließlich Preisgestaltung, SKU-Verwaltung und Produktinformationen. - Unterstützen Sie die Geschäftsverfolgung während der Saison und ermöglichen Sie zeitnahe Maßnahmen basierend auf den Marktanforderungen. - Verwalten Sie Ad-hoc-Projekte, um die Autonomie im Projektmanagement zu erhöhen. - Präsentieren Sie die Kollektion regionalen Merchandising-Leitern während wichtiger GTM-Meilensteine. ## ## EASTPAK-PROJEKT – Koordinieren Sie Prozesse und Ausrichtung aller wichtigen Meilensteine ​​mit dem Eastpak-Team. - Unterstützen Sie die Entwicklung der Linie und stellen Sie sicher, dass sie mit der Markenstrategie von Timberland und Eastpak übereinstimmt. - Leitung der Kalenderkoordination und des Mustereinkaufs. - Arbeiten Sie eng mit AMER, EMEA, APAC, dem Eastpak-Team und globalen TBL-Partnern zusammen, um marktrelevante Sortimente bereitzustellen. - Bewerten Sie globale Linien, Trends und Wettbewerb, um Leerraumchancen zu identifizieren, einschließlich Umsatz und Marge. - Unterstützen Sie das Preis- und Lebenszyklusmanagement. - Führen Sie saisonale Analysen mit regionalen Händlern und Planern durch und identifizieren Sie Möglichkeiten (einschließlich OMU/SMU). - Leiten Sie die PLM-Implementierung für Taschen und stellen Sie die laufende Wartung von Enovia sicher. ## ## Wie Sie einen Unterschied machen werden Sie erreichen dies durch: - Aufrechterhaltung von Genauigkeit und Klarheit in allen Merchandising-Systemen und Produktinformationen. - Enge Zusammenarbeit mit der Merchandising-Führung, um strategische und operative Prioritäten zu unterstützen. - Effektive Zusammenarbeit mit Witz h funktionsübergreifende Partner, um eine reibungslose saisonale Abwicklung zu ermöglichen. - Sie bringen starke analytische Fähigkeiten mit, um Chancen zu erkennen und die Linienleistung zu verbessern. - Demonstrieren Sie eine hohe Liebe zum Detail und Eigenverantwortung bei allen Prozessen und Ergebnissen. - Unterstützung der Ausrichtung saisonaler Sortimente durch klare Kommunikation und strukturierte Dokumentation. - Bleiben Sie mit Marktbedürfnissen, Verbrauchereinblicken und internen Meilensteinen auf dem Laufenden, um Trends zu antizipieren und schnell zu reagieren. ## ## Fähigkeiten für den Erfolg Während eine formale Ausbildung in den Bereichen Merchandising, Betriebswirtschaft, Marketing oder einem verwandten Bereich von Vorteil ist, sind ein paar Jahre Erfahrung im Merchandising, Produktmanagement oder einem verwandten Bereich am wichtigsten. Die erforderlichen grundlegenden Fähigkeiten sind: - Starke analytische Fähigkeiten und Verständnis für die Produktleistung. - Solide Kenntnisse der Merchandising-Prozesse und des Produktlebenszyklus. - Ausgezeichnete organisatorische Fähigkeiten und die Fähigkeit, mehrere Prioritäten zu verwalten. - Große Liebe zum Detail und Genauigkeit. - Fähigkeit zur Zusammenarbeit in globalen und regionalen Teams. - Starke Kommunikationsfähigkeiten, schriftlich und mündlich. - Kenntnisse im Umgang mit Merchandising-Systemen (PLM, Enovia bevorzugt) und Excel. - Proaktive, lösungsorientierte Denkweise. - Flexibilität zur Bewältigung saisonaler Arbeitsbelastungsspitzen. ## ## Was Sie davon haben – Eine unterstützende, auf Feedback basierende Kultur, die von Respekt und Integrität geleitet wird. - Ein integratives, internationales Umfeld, in dem unterschiedliche Hintergründe und Erfahrungen geschätzt werden. - Die Möglichkeit, dabei zu sein einer ikonischen Lifestyle-Marke innerhalb einer globalen Multimarken-Organisation. - Fitnessstudio vor Ort mit Initiativen für Gesundheit und Wohlbefinden. - Eine Rabattkarte mit 50 % Rabatt auf alle VF-Marken. - Pausenbereiche mit kostenlosen Heißgetränken. ## ## Freiheit, Inklusion und Vielfalt Als zielorientiertes, leistungsorientiertes Unternehmen fördern wir eine Kultur der Zugehörigkeit, die auf Respekt, Offenheit, Verbundenheit und Authentizität basiert. Wir schätzen Vielfalt und unterstützen die Chancengleichheit aller Mitarbeiter und Bewerber. Wenn das auf Sie zutrifft und Sie bereit sind, unserem Team beizutreten, würden wir uns freuen, von Ihnen zu hören! #readytoapply R-20260309-0029
descriptionByLocale.fr: Timberland EMEA est à la recherche d'un Associate Merchandiser exceptionnel pour un contrat à durée déterminée de 6 mois, pour rejoindre notre équipe basée à Stabio, en Suisse. ## ## Parlons du rôle Une journée dans la vie du marchandiseur associé chez Timberland ressemble un peu à ceci. Vous jouerez un rôle clé en soutenant l'équipe de marchandisage tout au long des étapes saisonnières, en garantissant l'exactitude des informations sur les produits, la coordination des assortiments et l'alignement avec la stratégie de marque. Vous gérerez les systèmes, les échantillons, les rapports saisonniers et l'analyse des performances pour aider à créer des assortiments adaptés aux consommateurs. Vous contribuerez également à la collaboration interfonctionnelle, en soutenant le développement de produits, les mises à jour des prix et les assortiments dans les régions. Une partie de ce rôle consiste à diriger les processus opérationnels liés au projet Eastpak, à assurer la coordination, la planification et la cohérence à travers les étapes mondiales. ## ## Décomposons un peu plus cette journée de la vie - Posséder une gestion précise des attributs du produit. - Gérer l'assortiment HTT pour la collection assignée et GBA (Bags, Women Outlet + support sur Mainline Women), en assurant l'alignement avec FTW, Accessoires et Marketing. - Définir le mix merchandising idéal et les priorités saisonnières en accord avec le responsable merchandising. - Soutenir l'équipe de marchandisage à travers la saisie de données, l'organisation des échantillons et les rapports saisonniers. - Suivre et analyser les performances des produits pour identifier les best-sellers, les retardataires et les tendances de consommation. - Aider à la construction des plans de lignes saisonnières, e garantir des détails et des mises à jour précis du produit. - Collaborer avec des équipes interfonctionnelles pour soutenir le développement de produits, les mises à jour des prix et l'alignement de l'assortiment. - Gérer les mises à jour du système, y compris les prix, la gestion des SKU et les informations sur les produits. - Prend en charge le suivi des activités en saison, permettant des actions rapides en fonction des besoins du marché. - Gérer des projets ponctuels pour accroître l'autonomie dans la gestion de projet. - Présenter la collection aux responsables du merchandising régionaux lors des étapes clés de GTM. ## ## PROJET EASTPAK - Coordonner les processus et l'alignement sur toutes les étapes clés avec l'équipe Eastpak. - Soutenir la création de la ligne, en assurant l'alignement avec la stratégie de marque de Timberland et Eastpak. - Diriger la coordination du calendrier et les achats d'échantillons. - Travailler en étroite collaboration avec AMER, EMEA, APAC, l'équipe Eastpak et les partenaires Global TBL pour proposer des assortiments pertinents pour le marché. - Évaluer la gamme mondiale, les tendances et la concurrence pour identifier les opportunités d'espace blanc, y compris les revenus et la marge. - Prise en charge de la tarification et de la gestion du cycle de vie. - Effectuer une analyse en saison avec les commerçants et les planificateurs régionaux, en identifiant les opportunités (y compris OMU/SMU). - Diriger la mise en œuvre du PLM pour les sacs et assurer la maintenance continue d'Enovia. ## ## Comment vous ferez la différence Vous y parviendrez en : - Maintenant l'exactitude et la clarté de tous les systèmes de marchandisage et des informations sur les produits. - Travailler en étroite collaboration avec la direction du marchandisage pour soutenir les priorités stratégiques et opérationnelles. - Collaborer efficacement avec h des partenaires interfonctionnels pour permettre une exécution saisonnière fluide. - Apporter de solides compétences analytiques pour identifier les opportunités et améliorer les performances de la ligne. - Démontrer une grande attention aux détails et à l'appropriation des processus et des livrables. - Soutenir l'alignement des assortiments saisonniers grâce à une communication claire et une documentation structurée. - Rester connecté aux besoins du marché, aux informations des consommateurs et aux étapes internes pour anticiper les tendances et réagir rapidement. ## ## Compétences pour réussir Bien qu'une formation formelle en marchandisage, en affaires, en marketing ou dans un domaine connexe soit un plus, ce qui compte le plus, ce sont quelques années d'expérience en marchandisage, en gestion de produits ou dans un domaine connexe. Les compétences fondamentales requises sont : - De solides compétences analytiques et une compréhension des performances des produits. - Solide connaissance des processus de marchandisage et du cycle de vie des produits. - Excellentes compétences organisationnelles et capacité à gérer plusieurs priorités. - Grande attention aux détails et à la précision. - Capacité à travailler en collaboration avec des équipes mondiales et régionales. - Solides compétences en communication, écrite et verbale. - Maîtrise des systèmes de merchandising (PLM, Enovia de préférence) et Excel. - Esprit proactif et orienté solutions. - Flexibilité pour prendre en charge les pics de charge de travail saisonniers. ## ## Ce que cela vous apporte : Une culture de soutien, basée sur le feedback, guidée par le respect et l'intégrité. - Un environnement international inclusif où la diversité des parcours et des expériences est valorisée. - La possibilité d'en faire partie d'une marque lifestyle emblématique au sein d'une organisation mondiale multimarque. - Salle de sport sur place avec des initiatives santé et bien-être. - Une carte de réduction offrant 50% de réduction sur toutes les marques VF. - Des espaces de détente avec boissons chaudes gratuites. ## ## Libre d'être, inclusion et diversité En tant qu'entreprise axée sur un objectif et axée sur la performance, nous favorisons une culture d'appartenance basée sur le respect, l'ouverture, la connexion et l'authenticité. Nous célébrons la diversité et soutenons l’égalité des chances pour tous les associés et candidats. Si cela vous ressemble et que vous êtes prêt à rejoindre notre équipe, nous serions ravis d’avoir de vos nouvelles ! #prêtàpostuler R-20260309-0029

jobs.title: Allocator Intern - EMEA Internship Program
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Allocator Intern for Vans. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! We are looking for a Allocator intern to join VANS within VF EMEA Internship Program. In this role, you will provide support to the Allocation Team: - By taking an active role in analysing performance and sales trend. - Monitoring deliveries, maintaining adequate stock levels. - Taking care of replenishment / initial allocation for O&O EMEA Stores. - Developing and maintaining reports and tools finding the best way to make them efficient and useful for the team. How you will make a difference You should be an analytical, resilient and curious team player, being: - Fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills. - Passionate for numbers with strong analytical skills: accuracy and attention to details is a must. - Proficient in Microsoft Excel. Knowledge of any BI platform will be considered as a plus (eg: Power BI). - Eager to learn and face up new challenges. - Proactive in order to achieve yours and your team goals. - First experiences such as other internships, extracurricular activities, is considered as a plus What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Learn about Vans’ trends and main logics of Retail Merchandising. - Learn logics of inventory management, sales analysis, and allocation strategies. - Learn to work with a wide team of internal stakeholder. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260205-0007
